document_inventory.description: Operator statement says the structure was intact after a reported event, but the underlying official assessment or clearance document is not attached.

unresolved_exceptions.description: The operator statement references an official office but does not attach the source record, signed report, or clearance document.
unresolved_exceptions.resolution_route: Request the underlying assessment or clearance from the issuing office and owner/operator.

manual_request_targets.target: Pasay City Engineering Office or Building Official
manual_request_targets.request: Ask for the underlying post-event assessment, tag/status, or clearance record referenced by the operator statement.

overclaim_boundary.allowed_conclusion: An operator/corporate claim was found and is a weak lead only; official or professional clearance evidence remains unresolved.

query_log.result_summary: Operator/corporate claim found; no attached official clearance record.

packet_result.summary: Only an operator/corporate claim was found; it remains separated from official or professional clearance evidence.
